# Prepare normalization and search functions
import re
import unicodedata
from difflib import SequenceMatcher

def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    s = str(text)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('\u0640','')
    # remove diacritics and other combining marks
    # range includes Arabic tashkeel: 0x0610-0x061A, 0x064B-0x065F, 0x0670, 0x06D6-06ED maybe
    # We'll remove characters with Unicode category Mn (Mark, nonspacing)
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # Normalize common Arabic letters
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ؤ','و')
    # remove tatweel again
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    # remove punctuation and non-Arabic letters/digits
    # keep Arabic letters and numbers and spaces
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF0-9\s]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    # lowercase doesn't change arabic, but to ensure stable
    s = s.lower()
    return s
